title: Battle of Mon Calamari (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Mon Calamari''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
===[[Clone Wars]]===
*'''[[Battle of Mon Cala]]''', a battle during the [[Clone Wars]].
*[[Battle of Mon Calamari (Saesee Tiin)|'''Battle of Mon Calamari''']], a battle that [[Saesee Tiin]] fought in.

===[[Imperial Era]]===
*'''[[Invasion of Mon Cala]]''', the [[Galactic Empire]]'s occupation on [[Mon Cala]].
**'''[[Battle of Dac City]]''', a battle in [[Dac City]] in [[18 BBY]] between the Galactic Empire and the [[Mon Calamari monarchy]].
**'''[[Attack on Bergon's sky-base]]''', a battle shortly after in which the [[Mon Calamari]] destroyed Imperial [[Colonel]] [[Bergon]]'s [[aerial landing platform]].
**'''[[Defense of the southern polar regions]]''', a defense of the south of Mon Cala by [[Raddus]].
**'''[[Skirmish in Bel City]]''', a battle shortly after in [[Bel City]] between the Galactic Empire and the [[Jedi]] [[Ferren Barr]] and his disciples.
**'''[[Duel in the Royal Command Bunker]]''', a [[Lightsaber duel|duel]] between Ferren Barr and [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] in the [[Royal Command Bunker]].

===[[Galactic Civil War]]===
*'''[[Mutiny on Mon Cala]]''', the rebellion of Mon Cala and the [[Mon Cala Mercantile Fleet]] to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]].
*'''[[Scouring of Mon Cala]]''', a battle above Mon Cala between the [[New Republic]] and the Galactic Empire.

===[[First Order-Resistance War]]===
*'''[[Mission to Mon Cala]]''', a battle above Mon Cala between the [[First Order]] and the [[Resistance]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]===
*[[Attack on Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)|'''Attack on Mon Calamari''']]
*[[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|'''Battle of Mon Calamari''']]
*[[Battle of Mon Cala/Legends|'''Battle of Mon Cala''']], also known as the Second Battle of Mon Calamari.

===[[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]===
*'''[[Subjugation of Mon Calamari]]'''

===[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]===
*'''[[Heurkea operation]]'''
*'''[[Calamarian Revolt]]'''
*'''[[Rescue at Mon Calamari]]'''
*'''[[Ambush at Mon Calamari]]'''
*[[Defense of Mon Calamari (Galactic Civil War)|'''Defense of Mon Calamari''']]
*'''[[Battle of Calamari]]'''
*'''[[Attack on Mon Calamari]]'''

===[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]===
*[[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|'''Defense of Mon Calamari''']]

===[[Second Imperial Civil War]]===
*[[Battle of Mon Calamari (Second Imperial Civil War)|'''Battle of Mon Calamari''']]

===[[Darth Wredd's insurgency]]===
*'''[[Liberation of Mon Calamari Shipyards]]'''
